summary: Dashboard screen violates brand palette consistency by using generic neutral colors instead of the required diner aesthetic. The interface lacks the cream surfaces, teal backgrounds, and proper visual treatment mandated for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Logged-in dashboard uses generic white/gray palette instead of diner brand colors. Should use cream surfaces (#fff8ea) for cards and proper brand treatment to maintain visual continuity with public routes.
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of required diner palette surfaces. Cards should use cream (#fff8ea) or other declared palette colors, not generic white backgrounds.
The 'Resend verification email' CTA button uses correct pink fill (#ffb3c7) but the overall interface violates brand consistency by not maintaining diner aesthetic in the authenticated context.

actions: Apply cream surface color (#fff8ea) to dashboard cards and containers
Ensure authenticated UI maintains visual continuity with public brand treatment
Update dashboard background and surface colors to use diner palette instead of generic neutrals
Verify mobile drawer navigation maintains brand consistency when implemented
